template_usage: billing contact form validates local input before checkout
readiness route reports missing Stripe keys and Price IDs
dashboard provider card links the readiness endpoint and receipt
checkout route returns readiness/provider-boundary states when Stripe config is missing
webhook route returns provider-boundary states when Stripe server or webhook secrets are missing
blocked_until_configured: default or plan-specific Stripe Price ID
application base URL for redirect URLs outside localhost
billing-mode QA in the app environment
honesty_notes: This receipt is not live Stripe checkout, webhook verification, redirect, or fulfillment proof.
The template owns editable payment source and readiness gates, but app credentials and Stripe account configuration remain app-owned.
No secret values are read into this receipt.
